spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates a very creative use case of image(<color>) inside the cursor property with hotspot coordinates and keyword fallbacks.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive controls allowing separate color and fallback cursor configurations for four independent hover zones.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The parent blurb accurately describes the cursor designer concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Allows testing multiple cursor types (pointer, crosshair, move, etc.) to ensure the fallback works correctly when image() is unsupported.

references.rationale: The see also section now includes the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses design system colors and styles, and implements contrast-safe backgrounds for interactive elements.

summary: A highly creative demo showcasing cursor: image(<color>) custom cursors with independent configuration for four zones, now with the required ChromeStatus reference.
